Class LoanDaoImpl

java.lang.Object
com.library.dao.impl.LoanDaoImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
LoanDao
public class LoanDaoImpl extends Object implements LoanDao
JDBC implementation of LoanDao.

All queries are executed via PreparedStatement — no string concatenation is used anywhere in this class.

The search(String, String, LocalDate, LocalDate) method applies smart text matching: a numeric string triggers an exact ID lookup, while a non-numeric string triggers a LIKE search across the book title and reader name.

  • Method Details

    • conn

      private Connection conn()
      Returns:
      the active JDBC connection from the singleton pool

    • mapRow

      private Loan mapRow(ResultSet rs) throws SQLException
      Maps the current row of a ResultSet to a Loan object.
      Parameters:
      rs - the result set positioned on the row to map
      Returns:
      a fully populated Loan
      Throws:
      SQLException - if any column access fails

    • findAll

      public List<Loan> findAll()
      Description copied from interface: LoanDao
      Returns all loans ordered by id descending (newest first).
      Specified by:
      findAll in interface LoanDao
      Returns:
      an unmodifiable snapshot; never null

    • findById

      public Optional<Loan> findById(int id)
      Description copied from interface: LoanDao
      Finds a single loan by its primary key.
      Specified by:
      findById in interface LoanDao
      Parameters:
      id - the loan ID to look up
      Returns:
      an Optional containing the loan, or empty if not found

    • search

      public List<Loan> search(String text, String status, LocalDate dateFrom, LocalDate dateTo)
      Builds and executes a dynamic WHERE clause.

      Smart text dispatch: if text is a valid integer it is treated as an exact loan ID; otherwise a LIKE search is performed against both the book title and the reader name. Dynamic multi-field search with optional filters.

      • text — if the value is numeric, performs an exact match on loans.id; otherwise performs a case-insensitive LIKE match against books.title and readers.full_name; ignored if blank
      • status — exact match against status; ignored if blank
      • dateFrom — loan_date >= dateFrom; ignored if null
      • dateTo — loan_date <= dateTo; ignored if null
      Specified by:
      search in interface LoanDao
      Parameters:
      text - free-text / ID search term; may be blank
      status - exact status filter ("active", "returned", "overdue"); may be blank
      dateFrom - lower bound for loan date; may be null
      dateTo - upper bound for loan date; may be null
      Returns:
      matching loans ordered by id descending; never null

    • insert

      public void insert(Loan l)
      Description copied from interface: LoanDao
      Inserts a new loan record. The id field is ignored; the generated key is assigned by the database.
      Specified by:
      insert in interface LoanDao
      Parameters:
      l - the loan to insert (bookId, readerId, and dueDate must be set)

    • update

      public void update(Loan l)
      Description copied from interface: LoanDao
      Updates an existing loan record identified by loan.getId().
      Specified by:
      update in interface LoanDao
      Parameters:
      l - the loan with updated fields; id must be valid

    • delete

      public void delete(int id)
      Description copied from interface: LoanDao
      Deletes the loan with the given id.
      Specified by:
      delete in interface LoanDao
      Parameters:
      id - the primary key of the loan to delete

    • markOverdue

      public int markOverdue()
      Description copied from interface: LoanDao
      Sets status to "overdue" for all active loans whose due_date is before today. Called once on application startup.
      Specified by:
      markOverdue in interface LoanDao
      Returns:
      the number of rows updated

    • countByBookId

      public int countByBookId(int bookId)
      Description copied from interface: LoanDao
      Counts loans for a given book. Used to build cascade-delete confirmation.
      Specified by:
      countByBookId in interface LoanDao

    • countByReaderId

      public int countByReaderId(int readerId)
      Description copied from interface: LoanDao
      Counts loans for a given reader. Used to build cascade-delete confirmation.
      Specified by:
      countByReaderId in interface LoanDao

    • deleteByBookId

      public void deleteByBookId(int bookId)
      Description copied from interface: LoanDao
      Deletes all loans for the given book. Must be called before deleting the book.
      Specified by:
      deleteByBookId in interface LoanDao

    • deleteByReaderId

      public void deleteByReaderId(int readerId)
      Description copied from interface: LoanDao
      Deletes all loans for the given reader. Must be called before deleting the reader.
      Specified by:
      deleteByReaderId in interface LoanDao

    • query

      private List<Loan> query(String sql, List<Object> args)
      Executes a parameterized SELECT and maps all rows to Loan objects.
      Parameters:
      sql - the fully formed SQL query string
      args - ordered list of bind values (String, Integer, or LocalDate)
      Returns:
      list of matched loans; never null
